name: Suspicious OneNote Process Chain Activity via Microsoft Telemetry
description: Microsoft telemetry detection that identifies OneNote spawning mshta.exe, which in turn attempts to execute or download content using curl.exe. This behavior is consistent with malicious document-based delivery techniques where threat actors embed scripts or payload downloaders inside OneNote files.

rules.name: Suspicious OneNote Process Chain Activity via Microsoft Telemetry

author: Lorenzo Laureano
